project.name: Headhunt Manager (FDIWork)
project.type: Next.js 16 App Router, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL, TailwindCSS
project.status: CRM MVP complete, FDIWork core flows implemented, security hardening applied

features: Authentication (NextAuth.js + custom JWT for employer portal)
Candidate Management (tags, seniority, skills, CV upload)
Job Management & Applicant Pipeline (notes, interview tracking)
FDIWork Public Website (homepage, jobs, companies, apply)
Employer Portal (register, dashboard, manage job postings)
CRM Integration (import FDIWork applications to CRM, employer-client linking)

database_schema.summary: ATS + employer portal + public job board
notable_constraints: Employer has unique email and unique clientId link

conventions: Native PostgreSQL String[] cho list đơn giản thay vì relation table
Server Actions trả object theo pattern success/error
Public routes dùng slug tiếng Việt: /viec-lam, /cong-ty, /ung-tuyen
Moderation/admin phải được chặn ở cả route, UI và server action
Import ứng viên chỉ hỗ trợ .xlsx và .csv
security_notes: EMPLOYER_JWT_SECRET là bắt buộc, không có fallback mặc định
Rate limiting cơ bản đã áp cho CRM login, employer auth, public upload, public apply
xlsx đã bị loại bỏ khỏi codebase do advisory high
